/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/M4OEP.dir/keyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/M4OEP.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/M4OEP.dir/main_viewport.cpp.o -o ../../bin/M4OEP  ../whale/libwhale.a ../../vcpkg_installed/arm64-osx/debug/lib/libglad.a ../../vcpkg_installed/arm64-osx/debug/lib/libglm.a ../../vcpkg_installed/arm64-osx/debug/lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation -framework OpenGL
